intro:
Match.com is one of the oldest paid dating platforms. Its serious-relationship positioning is clear, but the mandatory subscription (~$40/month) and aging user base make it less attractive in 2026.

Embir offers the same serious-matching ambitions with verified profiles and deep compatibility — completely free during launch.

sections.title: Why choose Embir over Match.com?
sections.content: Match.com suffers from a mandatory expensive subscription and an aging user base. Embir solves these limitations with deep compatibility matching, verified profiles, and bidirectional filtering that truly respects your orientation both ways.
highlights: Bidirectional filtering — your orientation applies both ways
Verified profiles — fewer bots and fake accounts
100% free at launch — no credit card required

verdict: If you use Match.com and want an alternative that better respects your orientation, verifies profiles, and is free — Embir is the best option in 2026.
ctaText: Try Embir free — the best Match.com alternative

faq.a: Embir has verified profiles, bidirectional filtering and human moderation that Match.com doesn't offer. For LGBTQ+ inclusivity and safety, Embir is superior.
Yes. Discovery, matching and messaging are free during the launch phase.

faq.q: How does Embir compare to Match.com for LGBTQ+ dating?
faq.a: Embir was built from scratch for all orientations. Match.com added LGBTQ+ support gradually with often insufficient filtering.
